summary: Full frontend testing of Solera Animal Center landing page. All 20 test scenarios passed after fixing a tab title issue (frontend restart required to pick up index.html changes).
action_items: Tab title was not updating without a frontend restart — CRA dev server caches index.html. Fixed by restarting frontend via supervisorctl. No code change needed, but main agent should be aware that public/index.html changes require a frontend restart.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero secondary CTA href is '#pricing' (literal) — the scrollTo is attached via onClick, so anchor href is '#pricing' which is acceptable for fallback but works correctly.
Contact info (phone, WhatsApp, email) correctly rendered as plain text with no anchor tags — DISPLAY ONLY requirement met.
SALES_WA constant correctly used in all CTA buttons (header, hero, pricing, floating WhatsApp).
Language toggle correctly persists in localStorage key 'lang' and defaults to 'es'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend tests pass. Tab title fix required supervisorctl restart of frontend (CRA caches index.html). The public/index.html already has the correct title. No code changes needed.
tests_passed: Tab title: Solera Animal Center | Liberia, Guanacaste
Default language is ES (Spanish)
Hero primary CTA links to SALES WhatsApp (wa.me/50689939071)
Header CTA links to SALES WhatsApp
Emergency strip shows 24/7 text
Services section shows 12 service cards
Gallery section shows 6 images
Google Maps iframe embedded
Contact info (phone, WhatsApp, email) DISPLAY ONLY - no clickable links
Hours table has 4 rows (Mon-Fri, Sat, Sun, Emergencies)
Pricing CTA links to SALES WhatsApp
Footer Facebook links to facebook.com/soleraanimalcenter
Footer Instagram links to instagram.com/soleraanimalcenter
Footer shows 'Vista previa creada por Nexo Sites'
Floating WhatsApp button links to SALES WhatsApp
Language toggle switches to EN correctly
localStorage 'lang' key persists on toggle
Toggle back to ES works and persists
Nav links present (Servicios, Galería, Ubicación, Contacto)
Mobile menu (hamburger) opens correctly on mobile viewport
